releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.1.1

新功能
- 新增 PostgreSQL 数据源支持（12.x ~ 17.x），包含数据库、Schema、表三级浏览和只读查询工作台
- 数据源架构升级为插件化设计，后续新增数据源类型将更快、更稳定

问题修复
- 修复部分情况下支持者激活码导入后提示

的问题
- 修复手动安装新版本后数据源配置可能丢失的问题

支持的数据源
- MySQL 5.6 / 5.7 / 8.0 / 8.4
- PostgreSQL 12 / 13 / 14 / 15 / 16 / 17
- Redis 5.x / 6.x / 7.x
- Kafka 2.8 / 3.3 / 3.6
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.1.1

What's New
- Added PostgreSQL support (12.x ~ 17.x) with database, schema, and table browsing plus a read-only query workspace
- Upgraded to a plugin-based data source architecture for faster and more stable additions of new data source types

Fixes
- Fixed an issue where supporter activation code import would fail with "invalid signature"
- Fixed data source configurations potentially being lost after manually installing a new version

Supported Data Sources
- MySQL 5.6 / 5.7 / 8.0 / 8.4
- PostgreSQL 12 / 13 / 14 / 15 / 16 / 17
- Redis 5.x / 6.x / 7.x
- Kafka 2.8 / 3.3 / 3.6
